name: Per-hole money (Story 3-3) — greenie carryover, SAME scenario as greenie-carryover-on.json. Proves STATEFUL attribution: the swept greenie's money lands ENTIRELY on the resolving par-3 (H5), while the two earlier deferred par-3s (H1, H3) and the skipped par-4/5 (H2, H4) emit $0 PUSH rows — not because a carry is pending, but because their own base+greenie pts are 0 here.
_contract: Golden HAND-CALC fixture for Story 3-3 per-hole money with the stateful greenie-carryover modifier. teamPointsA per hole comes from the approved greenie-carryover-on hand-calc: pointsByHole={5:+3}, all other holes 0. The carried greenie does NOT smear across the deferred par-3s; its full +3 team points (+$15/player to team A) appear on H5. Every hole is settled (all nets = par present), so push holes emit explicit zero rows (a halved/no-money hole reads $0, distinct from an unsettled hole which emits NO row). Loss-less invariant: SUM over holes of perHole.perPlayerCents === ledger.perPlayerCents.
_handCalc: pv=500c flat. All base points 0 on every hole (every net=par). Greenie fold: H1 par3 unclaimed->roll, H2 par4 skip, H3 par3 unclaimed->roll, H4 par5 skip, H5 par3 a1 claims => sweep +3 team points. pointsByHole={5:+3}. So pts: H1..H4 = 0 (settled push rows, all zeros), H5 = +3 => teamASignedPerPlayerCents 1500. PER-PLAYER ROUND SUM a1 = 0+0+0+0+1500 = +1500c, matches the approved round ledger. STATEFUL ATTRIBUTION PROVEN: the carried greenie money appears ONLY on H5 (resolving par-3), $0 on the deferred par-3s H1/H3 (here $0 because their base is also a push). All 5 holes settled => 5 rows incl. 4 explicit zero (push) rows.
